positive: Minimalist forest scene silhouette, featuring a stylized deer and winding oak tree branches against a gradient sunset sky. The overall aesthetic should be highly graphic, clean, and suitable for screen printing. Use a limited color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, and matte black for high contrast. Composition should be centered and balanced, with strong, readable outlines. Vector art quality, clean edges, flat color fill, negative space emphasis. Perfect for t-shirt apparel printing, detailed line work, symmetrical composition, dreamy, magical forest ambience.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low detail, noisy, grain, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, 3d render, photo, realistic
